sections.paragraph:
unused in Kal. Arab. طَالَ Med. Waw, to be long.

Hiphil הֵטִיל to throw down at length, to prostrate (der Länge lang hinwerfen, comp. Isai. 22:17 ); to throw, to cast, as a spear, 1Sa 18:11 20:33 to cast out as from a country, Jer 16:13 22:26 from a ship, Jon 1:5, 12 Jon 1:12to send forth a wind, Jon 1:4.

Hophal, to be prostrated, Psa 37:24 Job 41:1 to be cast as a lot, Pro 16:33 to be cast out, Jer 22:28.

Pilpel, טִלְטֵל i.q. Hiphil, to prostrate, to cast forth, Isa 22:17.

Derivative, טַלְטֵלָה.
